name: AppSec SNOW Ticket Intelligence Dashboard
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get install -y git-lfs && git lfs install && pip install -r requirements.txt
postStartCommand: nohup python -m streamlit run app.py --server.port 8501 --server.address 0.0.0.0 --server.headless true --server.enableCORS false --server.enableXsrfProtection false --server.enableWebsocketCompression false > /tmp/streamlit.log 2>&1 &
